title: I love Mangle ResourcePack !
description: Resource pack for fans of such a character as Mangle from fnaf!
body:
So let me start by listing what is in the resource pack:
1. Changed inventory
2.Changed hotbar
3.Changed HP parameter
4. changed armor and hunger parameters (batteries instead of meat)
5.Changed sight, as well as attack indicator.
6. If you rename a netherite sword to "mangle paw", it will become a 3D model of Mangle's paw.
7. If you rename the totem of immortality to “Mangle”, it will become a 3D model of Mangle!
For correct operation you need Optifine or mods for factories that replace it. 

Also don't forget to support me with a donation!)

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f60ad836f4f50d083c9c275ed46619d3a3cec8a4.png)
